title: Clean Optimized
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90b076a4822868a391ab051a0e0a362bcf997723.png)
## ⚙️ About
Clean Optimized is a lightweight and clean Minecraft build designed for maximum performance without sacrificing the game's vanilla spirit.

## ✨ Features:
- Only 16 carefully selected mods, no unnecessary additions.
- The core is Sodium, which provides stable FPS and smooth graphics.
- Fully compatible with vanilla servers - you can play as usual, but with noticeably better performance.
- Because this build is just for optimization, there are no visual or useful mods here, you can add whatever you want!

**💨 Performance Example (Solo World, 16 Chunks):**

🖥️ Tested on: GTX 1650, i5-9400F, 8 GB RAM
- 💤 Vanilla: ~300–320 FPS AFK, ~300 FPS while running
- 💎 Clean Optimized: ~850 FPS AFK, ~600–700 FPS while running
  
💫 That’s up to 2–3× higher performance with the same settings — smooth, clean, and lightning fast! :3

**🚀 Ideal for those who want a clean, fast, and stable Minecraft experience—without decorative mods or clutter. Just enjoy the experience and be smooth.**

 
<details>
<summary>📦 Mods used</summary>

- BadOptimizations by thosea https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations
- Entity Culling by tr7zw https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling
- FerriteCore by malte0811 https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core
- ImmediatelyFast by RaphiMC https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast
- Lithium by CaffeineMC https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium
- More Culling by FX https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling
- Palladium by Mr.Toad https://modrinth.com/mod/mpalladium
- Particle Core by fzzyhmstrs https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-core
- Sodium by CaffeineMC https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium
- Sodium Extra by FlashyReese https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra
- Very Many Players https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric
- Other lib and api mods


</details>

## 💡 Advice
If you have an Nvidia graphics card, you can try nvidium mod, but for me it only makes things worse.

<details>
<summary>🧪 Nvidium</summary>


official mod page https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium

or an unofficial fork of the mod for newer versions https://github.com/drouarb/nvidium/releases

</details>

_For me personally, this modpack shows better results than all other popular modpacks_

🏷️ Tags: Optimization FPS Boost Sodium Performance Vanilla Plus Lightweight Minecraft Client Clean Optimized Оптимизация Фпс Содиум Производительность Ванилла Лёгкая сборка Майнкрафт Клиент Clean Optimized
